channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Archaeologists Make Stunning Discovery Inside Mummy’s Tomb  The Daily Beast
  3. The mummy, the Iliad, and a mysterious death ritual  National Geographic
  4. 10 Gems of Bluesky Today – Day 335  Daily Kos
  5. Mummy Manuscript  The Portugal News

item.title: CBS News insiders fear Bari Weiss will soon enact ‘massive changes’ to 60 Minutes - The Guardian
item.description:
1. CBS News insiders fear Bari Weiss will soon enact ‘massive changes’ to 60 Minutes  The Guardian
  2. Exclusive | Bari Weiss tapped Major Garrett for newsy ‘60 Minutes’ interview after ‘negotiation’ with Netanyahu: sources  New York Post
  3. The Major Trouble at '60'  status.news
  4. Why Didn’t Lesley Stahl Conduct 60 Minutes’s Netanyahu Interview?  The New Republic
  5. MAGA-Curious CBS Boss Plots ‘Massive Changes’ to Top Program  The Daily Beast

item.title: Putin Is Still a Liar. His Peace Talk Is Still Bullshit. - The Bulwark
item.description:
1. Putin Is Still a Liar. His Peace Talk Is Still Bullshit.  The Bulwark
  2. Analysis: Putin hints he might end Russia’s war in Ukraine. But why now?  CNN
  3. Putin remark on war ‘coming to a close’ points to exhaustion, not peace, analysts say  The Washington Post
  4. Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'  BBC
  5. Putin Said the War ‘Is Coming to a Close,’ but That’s Not All He Said  The New York Times

item.title: Why the Iran conflict is becoming a problem for BRICS - Al Jazeera
item.description:

item.title: Catholic Rebels Facing Excommunication Would ‘Rather Die’ Than Change - Newsweek
item.description:

item.title: Israeli forces set up a camp in the Iraqi desert during Iran war, officials say - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Saudi Arabia and the UAE Bombed Iran for Totally Different Reasons - Zeteo
item.description:
